_notes.file_purpose: Per-developer local config for the reverse-engineering skill. Holds absolute/relative paths to each subject's source that the skill indexes with graphify.
_notes.subjects.<slug>.source_path: Path (absolute or repo-relative) where the subject's code/artifacts live. On Windows use double backslashes as shown. On Linux/macOS use forward slashes. The skill validates the path exists before indexing.
_notes.subjects.<slug>.last_run: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last successful save. Auto-updated in Step 6.3.
_notes.subjects.<slug>.last_source_indexed: Path of the first Q2 document folder used in the previous run. Used as the default suggestion for Q2 on the next run for the same subject.
_notes.gitignore: This file MUST be in .gitignore — paths are developer-specific. The skill adds the entry in Step 0.2 on first run.
_notes.adding_a_subject: A new entry is created automatically when the user introduces a new slug in Q1. You can also pre-seed entries here to skip Q3 on known subjects.
